positive: A stylized, intricate symmetrical mandala featuring intertwining bioluminescent flora and constellations. The central design should focus on highly detailed, elegant linework and solid silhouettes against a deep cosmic navy background. Include elements like stylized crescent moons, geometric star patterns, and glowing vine structures in emerald green, gold, and deep violet tones. High contrast, clean vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Intricate, symmetrical, glowing, cosmic floral mandala, central composition, highly detailed, 8k, clean silhouette, high contrast.
